subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest the pure wine from the hand of My bounty, O thou who soarest in Mine atmosphere, O thou who art consumed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الشارب رحیقی من ید عطائی و یا ایها الطائر فی هوائی و یا ایها المحترق
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @justice and wrath of God
